four_layer_diagnosis.measurement: broken -- no-op means nothing to measure

biological_reference.closest_mechanism: 5-HT dorsal raphe tonic silence during REM; cumulative cross-cycle modulation of replay quality
biological_reference.divergence: None -- EMA-based cross-cycle reference is defensible biological translation

targets.recommended_evidence_quality_note: Superseded: within-cycle no-op bug (target==rv at writeback). F1 fix applied in EXQ-541a.
learning_extracted: Within-cycle no-op: rv read and written back in same cycle produces no net change
F1 fix: cross-cycle EMA (alpha=0.1) replaces capture-only consumer

four_layer_diagnosis.claim_alignment: intact -- mechanism fires correctly; C3 failure = timescale mismatch
four_layer_diagnosis.implementation: complete -- fires every cycle, sign-consistent, step=0.1 produces consistent adjustments
four_layer_diagnosis.environment: too sparse -- timescale: 4 sleep cycles per arm; EMA_alpha=0.1 needs ~10 cycles
four_layer_diagnosis.measurement: under-instrumented -- rv divergence is noisy proxy; GAP-8 metrics more direct

biological_reference.closest_mechanism: 5-HT dorsal raphe tonic silence during REM; cumulative cross-cycle modulation (Jouvet 1969, reviewed in Hobson & Pace-Schott 2002)
biological_reference.divergence: None -- slow cumulative EMA is correct biological translation

targets.recommended_evidence_quality_note: Reclassify from weakens to inconclusive_timescale. Mechanism fires every cycle (C1 PASS, 3/3 seeds), sign-consistent adjustments (C2: sign_consistency=1.0, mean_abs_delta=0.0036). C3 fails (rv_divergence 0.56% vs threshold 5%) because 4 sleep cycles insufficient for EMA_alpha=0.1 signal (needs ~10 cycles). Not a falsification. Retest with >20 cycles + GAP-8 proxy metrics.
learning_extracted: MECH-204 fires every cycle (3/3 seeds) with sign-consistent adjustments -- mechanism confirmed functional
rv divergence = 0.56% at 4 cycles, step=0.1 -- timescale gap identified
EMA_alpha=0.1 requires ~10 cycles to accumulate detectable signal
targets.routing: queue-experiment -- longer timescale (>20 sleep cycles, step=0.25) + GAP-8 proxy metrics

four_layer_diagnosis.claim_alignment: intact -- monotone dose-response confirmed; C4 failure = timescale mismatch
four_layer_diagnosis.environment: too sparse -- timescale: 4 sleep cycles per arm
four_layer_diagnosis.measurement: under-instrumented -- rv trajectory divergence is noisy; GAP-8 metrics more direct

biological_reference.closest_mechanism: 5-HT dorsal raphe tonic silence during REM; cumulative modulation

targets.recommended_evidence_quality_note: Reclassify from weakens to inconclusive_timescale. Monotone dose-response confirmed (C4: 0.31% -> 0.63% -> 1.56% rv divergence at step 0.05/0.10/0.25). Best arm (step=0.50) achieves 1.75% at 4 cycles. C4 threshold (5%) requires ~24 cycles at step=0.5. Not a falsification -- timescale gap. Retest with >20 cycles + GAP-8 proxy metrics.
learning_extracted: Monotone dose-response (0.31% -> 0.63% -> 1.56% at step 0.05/0.10/0.25) -- weak positive signal
Step=0.50 achieves 1.75% at 4 cycles; ~24 cycles needed for 5% at this step
Linear extrapolation: ~11 cycles for 5% at step=0.25 (most biologically plausible step size)
targets.routing: queue-experiment -- >20 sleep cycles per arm, step=0.25, GAP-8 metrics as primary criterion

cluster_pattern.shape: Mechanism fires correctly (C1/C2 PASS in 541a/541b), monotone dose-response confirmed, but rv trajectory divergence too small due to timescale mismatch (4 cycles vs ~10-24 needed). weakens over-strong.
cluster_pattern.structural_property: Timescale mismatch: EMA_alpha=0.1 requires ~10+ sleep cycles for signal accumulation; experiments run 4 cycles. This is a consistent property across both runs.
readings: inconclusive_timescale (primary) -- mechanism confirmed functional, effect size unreachable at short timescale
measurement_gap (secondary) -- rv trajectory divergence is noisy proxy; GAP-8 metrics (replay_diversity_index, post_sleep_z_goal_retention) are more direct

retest_design.secondary_criterion: rv_relative_divergence (expected ~5.6% at step=0.25 over 20 cycles based on linear extrapolation)
